headline: Women run a record 11.2% of Fortune 500 companies in 2026—but the gain came in a year of high-profile exits
summary: Internal promotions and outside hires helped the Fortune 500 notch more women CEOs.

headline: DTE Energy partners with LG to deploy 6 GWh of battery storage
summary: By 2042, DTE expects to have more than 2.9 GW of energy storage on its system, more than doubling its current storage capacity.
